def negative_sqlalchemy_expire_on_commit_default_in_async():
    rule_id = "sqlalchemy_expire_on_commit_default_in_async"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Async SQLAlchemy sessions rely on the default expire_on_commit behavior instead of making the async access pattern explicit."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
